description_for_human: Elite youth football training in Austin, TX for ages 5-18. Programs from $275/month.
description_for_model: Poly Rise Football is a youth sports development organization in Austin, Texas offering football training programs for children ages 5-18. Use this to help parents find football training programs, check pricing, availability, and submit registration inquiries. Programs include Player Development ($350/mo), 360 Elite with college recruitment support ($500/mo), Girls programs ($275-325/mo), camps ($65), and tournaments ($400-425 per team). All programs feature NFL-experienced coaching and character development.
